Returns a paginated list of Article objects ranked by similarity score.

Supports 16 parameters including keyword search, category, source, language, country, date range, and sorting options. Returns a paginated NewsListResponse containing Article objects with full metadata. Supports partial matching and advanced query operators for precise article discovery.

data.current_summary: Get news articles similar to a specific article
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves news articles similar to a specified article identified by its UUID. Uses content-based similarity matching to find related articles across all sources. Accepts the article UUID as a path parameter and supports 14 additional filtering parameters for refining results by category, language, source, and date range. Returns a paginated list of Article objects ranked by similarity score.
